Article.ArticleTitle: Impact of kinesio tape application on post-operative recovery in patients undergoing surgical extraction of impacted mandibular third molars: A randomized clinical trial.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Department of Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, Meenakshi Ammal Dental College & Hospital, Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research (Deemed to be University), Chennai, 600095, Tamil Nadu, India.

Department of Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, Meenakshi Ammal Dental College & Hospital, Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research (Deemed to be University), Chennai, 600095, Tamil Nadu, India.

Department of Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, Meenakshi Ammal Dental College & Hospital, Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research (Deemed to be University), Chennai, 600095, Tamil Nadu, India. drdeepanjali.da@gmail.com.

Grant.Agency: Tamilnadu State Council For Science And Technology
Tamilnadu State Council For Science And Technology

MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Declarations. Ethical approval: This study was performed on human participants in accordance with the ethical standards of the Institutional Ethical Committee and Review Board from Meenakshi Ammal Dental College (MADC/IEC/II/47/2024). Competing interests: The authors declare no competing interests. Conflict of interest: The authors declare that they have no conflicts of interest relevant to the content of this article. Consent to publish: Written informed consent for publication of their clinical details and/or clinical images was obtained from the patient. Informed consent: Written informed consent was obtained from all participants.

Reference.Citation: Ristow O, Pautke C, Kehl V, Koerdt S, Hahnefeld L, Hohlweg-Majert B (2014) Kinesiologic taping reduces morbidity after oral and maxillofacial surgery: a pooled analysis. Physiother Theory Pract 30(4):290–298. https://doi.org/10.3109/09593985.2013.869772

Tatli U, Kucuk D, Uslu MO, Kurklu E, Erdogan O, Damlar I (2019) Effects of Kinesio taping and pressotherapy on facial swelling after orthognathic surgery: A randomized controlled study. J Craniomaxillofac Surg 47(1):47–53. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcms.2018.11.005

Jaroń A, Preuss O, Grzywacz E, Trybek G (2021) Impact of using Kinesio tape on non-infectious complications after impacted mandibular third molar surgery. Int J Environ Res Public Health 18(2):399. https://doi.org/10.3390/ijerph18020399

Abozied EE, Borhan WH, Osman HA, Hussein HG, El-Keblawy MM (2024) Combined effect of cryotherapy and kinesio taping on trismus post-third molar extraction surgery. Egypt J Phys Ther Rehabil 2(1):12–19

Yurttutan ME, Sancak KT (2020) The effect of Kinesio taping with the web strip technique on pain, edema, and trismus after impacted mandibular third molar surgery. Niger J Clin Pract 23(9):1260–1265. https://doi.org/10.4103/njcp.njcp_97_20

Patil S, Rajanikanth K, Bhola N (2023) Efficacy of Kinesio taping in post-operative sequelae after surgical removal of mandibular third molars: a split-mouth randomized control study. BMC Oral Health 23:964. https://doi.org/10.1186/s12903-023-03631-6

Golkar M, Taheri A, Alam M, Asadi Y, Keyhan SO (2023) The effects of Kinesio tapes on facial swelling following bimaxillary orthognathic surgery in the supraclavicular region. Maxillofac Plast Reconstr Surg 45:22. https://doi.org/10.1186/s40902-023-00390-8

Firoozi P, Souza MRF, de Souza GM, Fernandes IA, Galvão EL, Falci SGM (2022) Does kinesio taping reduce pain, swelling, and trismus after mandibular third molar surgery? A systematic review and meta-analysis. Oral Maxillofac Surg 26(4):535–553. https://doi.org/10.1007/s10006-021-01025-y

Russo D, Mariani P, Bifulco L, Ferrara S, Cicciù M, Laino L (2024) Three-dimensional morphometric analysis of the effectiveness of Kinesio taping on postoperative discomfort following mandibular third molar surgery: a prospective randomized split-mouth study. J Craniofac Surg 36(4):1387–1391. https://doi.org/10.1097/SCS.0000000000010756

Pławecki P, Pierwocha K, Terlecki W, Kawulok A, Bogacz M, Balicz A et al (2023) Kinesio taping as an adjunct therapy in postoperative care after extraction of impacted third lower molars—a randomized pilot study. J Clin Med 12(7):2694. https://doi.org/10.3390/jcm12072694

Ristow O, Hohlweg-Majert B, Stürzenbaum SR, Kehl V, Koerdt S, Pautke C (2014) Therapeutic elastic tape reduces morbidity after wisdom teeth removal—a clinical trial. Clin Oral Investig 18(4):1205–1212. https://doi.org/10.1007/s00784-013-1108-3
Carolina R et al (2021) Mechanisms and benefits of kinesiology taping in post-surgical rehabilitation. Phys Ther Rev 26(2):125–131

Liu K et al (2020) Kinesiology taping as an innovative measure against post-operative complications after third molar extraction—systematic review. J Clin Med 9(12):3988. https://doi.org/10.3390/jcm9123988

Heras ME, Sancak KT (2020) The effect of kinesio taping with the web strip technique on pain, edema, and trismus after impacted mandibular third molar surgery. Niger J Clin Pract 23(9):1260–1265. https://doi.org/10.4103/njcp.njcp_97_20

Pereira RVS, Moraes SLD, Monteiro JLGC, Gomes ACA, Pellizzer EP, Vasconcelos BCDE (2024) Effectiveness of elastic therapeutic tape in reducing edema, pain and trismus following surgery for facial fractures: a systematic review and meta-analysis. J Clin Med 13(4):997. https://doi.org/10.3390/jcm13040997

Weymuller EA Jr, Alsarraf R, Yueh B, Deleyiannis FW, Coltrera MD (2001) Analysis of the performance characteristics of the University of Washington Quality of Life instrument and its modification (UW-QOL-R). Arch Otolaryngol Head Neck Surg 127(5):489–493. https://doi.org/10.1001/archotol.127.5.489

Agarwal N, Nelson M, Mishra S, Agarwal P, Sharma D (2022) Effectiveness of adhesive taping to reduce pain, swelling and trismus after fracture mandible surgery. Trop Doct 53(1):121–124. https://doi.org/10.1177/00494755221140623
